para.style: text-align:left; text-indent:0px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:11px; margin-left:0px; line-height:1.07; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;
para.text: Prepare the tools needed for the various work procedures.
